items.name_en: 🆕 Chip Version.💕 Top-tier Original M12239 This Rosalie coin purse features the classic Monogram canvas from the Candy Factory collection, placing the brand mascot in a heart-shaped candy cane pattern, creating an exquisite gift for Vivienne fans. Open the Vivienne-shaped metal clasp to reveal multiple pockets for safely storing coins, bills, and cards.

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M11745 White] This zippy wallet is made of soft Mahina calfskin and embellished with an exquisite Monogram perforated pattern. Additionally, the wallet can be carried as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width) C
